MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: SRavinantapricha/D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Eugene Laidas is present.
Attorney Marc Seidenfeld appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Georgianna Barker is present.
Attorney Melissa A. Dubbs representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-11-2011 is vacated.
